title: For Patients | FDA
text:
DA Patient Representatives share what it means to serve in their unique role.
Patient Listening Sessions 
Patients, caregivers, advocates and community representatives can share their experiences, perspectives, and needs related to their health or a disease by talking directly with FDA staff.
Learn More 
About the Public Engagement Staff 
Learn more about FDA’s Public Engagement Staff. We help patients become more informed and involved in FDA regulatory decisions related to medical products.
About FDA Advisory Committees 
Learn more about why and how FDA advisory committees weigh the available scientific evidence and provide scientific advice on the safety, effectiveness, and appropriate use of FDA regulated products.
About Rare Diseases 
Learn more about rare diseases and how FDA supports the development of treatments for rare diseases.

FDA Advisory Committee Calendar
